title: leionema microphyllum
intro: Leionema microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved leionema or small-leaved matrush, is a small, shrubby plant native to the eastern regions of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in Australian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Leionema microphyllum are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, Leionema microphyllum can be made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
